prestazioni: Supercharged 1GR-FE (4.0L V6) with a Magnuson TVS2300 Supercharger (12 psi boost, 450whp, 420wtq) paired with a custom Forged Internals kit from JE Pistons (9.0:1 compression) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods, mated to a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission with a Spec Stage 3+ Clutch and lightweight flywheel

Full bolt-on forced induction supporting mods including a custom 3.5" intercooler piping kit from Injen, a Mishimoto 2-row aluminum intercooler, and a dual-core radiator from Koyorad with SPAL 16" fans for heat management, alongside a custom 3" turbo-back exhaust system from Borla with 409 stainless steel and 5" rolled tips

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (8-way adjustable damping, 20mm front/15mm rear drop), Whiteline 27mm front and 24mm rear sway bars, and poly bushings from Energy Suspension, paired with a TRD Pro rear differential with 4.88 gears and a Detroit Truetrac limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (X-Runner-specific, 3-piece front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber overfenders and a 2" extended wheelbase for aggressive stance, finished in BASF RM WB1000 matte black

Custom front splitter and rear diffuser from Seibon Carbon with integrated canards and a 3D-printed ABS rear wing (X-Runner-specific, 1200mm span, 300mm chord) mounted on adjustable carbon fiber pedestals for adjustable downforce (up to 150lbs at 100mph)

Enkei Raijin III wheels (18x9 +12 front, 18x10.5 +15 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (255/40/18 front, 295/35/18 rear), paired with custom Brembo GT 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers with 355mm and 330mm rotors respectively, and stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge
